title: This image seems to use containerd, I've given some privileges, but it doesn't seem to work.
body:
https://www.redhat.com/sysadmin/podman-inside-container
I followed this post to disable some security options.
`sudo podman run -d --name=wxedge --cap-add=sys_admin,mknod --device=/dev/fuse --security-opt label=disable --security-opt seccomp=unconfined --net=macvlan --tmpfs /run --tmpfs /tmp -v /media/wxedge_storage:/storage:rw  onething1/wxedge`
However, some errors are still reported when the image is run.
`failed to extract layer sha256:8d22c7426d9f2813dbc4169dc600331e8b41ddbe5dfbade1819e95ec4635cbbc: failed to mount /var/lib/containerd/tmpmounts/containerd-mount338121699: permission denied: unknown`
Do I still need to disable some security options?
```
sudo podman version
Version:      3.4.4
API Version:  3.4.4
Go Version:   go1.17.4
Git Commit:   f6526ada1025c2e3f88745ba83b8b461ca659933
Built:        Fri Dec 10 02:30:40 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```
```

host:

  cgroupControllers:

  cpus: 4

      crun version 1.4.1
      commit: 802613580a3f25a88105ce4b78126202fef51dfb

      +SYSTEMD +SELINUX +APPARMOR +CAP +SECCOMP +EBPF +CRIU +YAJL
  os: linux
```

comments.body: Thanks for reaching out. Please provide the data as requested in the issue template.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
